mentions.note: Crude leveraged play up 58% Q1; Anadarko acquisition (7 years ago) made it higher-risk crude bet; rallies hard on oil up, pulverized on oil down; big winner if Iran keeps strait closed, big loser if peace breaks out. Cramer historically skeptical.
Primary bull case is war risk premium; if regional conflict ends, stock will go down a lot. Be cautious here given geopolitical sensitivity.
